prestazioni: Engine: LT4 (6.2L supercharged V8, 668 hp stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel crankshaft (stroke increased to 98mm for 6.6L displacement), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Callies Compstar H-beam connecting rods. Supercharger porting by Lingenfelter with a 2.9L Whipple Gen 5 supercharger (18 psi boost) and dual 100mm throttle bodies for improved airflow.

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-9070 7-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (2,200 lb-ft torque capacity) and a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the 1.91:1 final drive ratio rear differential. Custom 3.5-inch driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop with CV joints for high-RPM stability.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the CT5-V’s 5-link rear suspension. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (405mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (380mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads. Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35R19 front, 305/30R19 rear) on HRE FF107SC wheels (19x10 front, 19x11 rear) with 5mm spacers for aggressive stagger.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny widebody kit (CT5-V-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT-style wing (adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators). Full carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors and integrated NACA ducts for intercooler cooling.

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green wrap with satin black accents (mirrors, grille, badges). Sequential LED taillights from Diode Dynamics with custom CT5-V Blackwing animation. Carbon fiber side skirts and rear bumper lip from Seibon Carbon.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin (dashboard, door cards, headliner) with red contrast stitching. Custom roll cage by Autopower (6-point, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system. Sparco Pro 2000 seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede).
